title: berkheya zeyheri subsp. rehmannii
intro: Berkheya zeyheri subsp. rehmannii is a plant species within the sunflower family, known for its unique appearance and medicinal properties. This plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Berkheya zeyheri subsp. rehmannii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusing the leaves or stems in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
